title: QR Code Generator
description: Free online QR code generator. Create QR codes from URLs, text, Wi-Fi credentials and more. Download as PNG instantly.
label: Text or URL
placeholder: Enter a URL or text to generate a QR code…

howToUse.label: Enter content
howToUse.description: Type or paste a URL, text, phone number, or Wi-Fi credentials into the input field.

howToUse.label: Adjust settings
howToUse.description: Choose the size and error correction level. Higher correction makes codes more robust.

howToUse.label: Preview
howToUse.description: The QR code is generated in real time as you type.

howToUse.label: Download
howToUse.description: Click "Download PNG" to save the QR code image to your device.

faq.question: What data can I encode in a QR code?
faq.answer: You can encode URLs, plain text, email addresses, phone numbers, SMS messages, Wi-Fi credentials (format: WIFI:S:<SSID>;T:WPA;P:<password>;;), and more.

faq.question: What is error correction level?
faq.answer: Error correction allows the QR code to be read even when partially damaged. Level L handles 7% damage, M handles 15%, Q handles 25%, and H handles 30%. Use H for printed codes that may get dirty.

faq.question: How large can the input text be?
faq.answer: QR codes can hold up to about 4,296 alphanumeric characters. For URLs, shorter is better. Very long text may produce a dense code that is harder to scan.

faq.question: Is this tool free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free. QR codes are generated in your browser — no data is sent to any server.

faq.question: Can I use the downloaded QR code commercially?
faq.answer: Yes. The generated image is yours to use freely, including in commercial contexts.
